taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Python, LLM APIs, AI-powered applications, Agent/automation frameworks, Software engineering fundamentals
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, LLM APIs:0.5, AI-powered applications:1.0, Agent/automation frameworks:1.0, Software engineering fundamentals:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of professional software engineering or applied AI experience, Strong proficiency in Python, with hands-on experience integrating LLM APIs, building AI-powered applications, or working with agent/automation frameworks, Demonstrated ability to work directly with non-technical or semi-technical business stakeholders, translating ambiguous problems into clear, actionable solutions, Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, Comfort explaining complex technical concepts to diverse audiences and building trust across teams, Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a bias toward simplicity and usability, Familiarity with core software engineering fundamentals, Ability to work smoothly across a range of technical environments (Mac, Windows, and Linux) as needed, Reliable and predictable availability
core_responsibilities: Serve as the primary technical partner for Jump’s back office teams, including Finance, Legal, HR, and other non-trading functions, as they integrate AI into their day-to-day work, Pair with developers and AI champions across the firm to identify high-value use cases, build solutions using Jump's internal AI platform, and work closely with R&D and infrastructure to unlock new capabilities as needed, Own the full lifecycle of back office AI solutions, from discovery and stakeholder conversations to prototyping, deployment, and ongoing iteration, while establishing best practices for prompting, agent design, evaluation, robustness, and responsible AI use, Drive successful adoption across the firm requires a fluid mix of technical depth, product intuition, and genuine curiosity about how business teams operate, Demonstrate knowledge of current best practices, follow new patterns closely as they emerge, experiment often, and are equally comfortable working with technical and non-technical stakeholders, Build, teach, and apply new techniques and technologies within a responsible, secure, and scalable framework
job_summary: Jump Trading Group is committed to world class research and empowers exceptional talents to apply cutting edge research to global financial markets. They are seeking an AI Adoption Engineer to serve as the primary technical partner for back office teams, integrating AI into their daily operations and managing the full lifecycle of AI solutions.
